Configuration file for an app package with dependencies in the NimBLE system.

# Purpose
This metadata file defines the configuration for a software package named `app`. It specifies the type of the package as `app` and includes placeholders for additional metadata such as `pkg.description`, `pkg.author`, `pkg.homepage`, and `pkg.keywords`, which are currently empty. The file lists the package dependencies under `pkg.deps`, which include various components from the Apache Mynewt project, such as the kernel, console, log, and stats stubs, as well as components from the NimBLE Bluetooth stack, including host services for GAP, GATT, DIS, and transport. These dependencies are necessary for the package to function correctly within the Apache Mynewt operating system environment.
